title: CloudflareSnapshot
description: Accumulated state for one CF solve phase, included in solved/failed events.

detection_method.description: How CF was detected: cf_chl_opt, title_interstitial, challenge_element, etc.

detection_poll_count.description: Number of 500ms polls before challenge detected (1-20)

widget_found.description: Whether the CF solver found the Turnstile widget element

widget_find_method.description: Which method found the widget: iframe-src, shadow-root-div, etc.

widget_find_methods.description: All widget find methods tried across retries

clicked.description: Whether the CF solver's click caused the solve. False if CF auto-solved independently. See click_attempted for dispatch-level tracking.

click_attempted.description: Whether the CF solver dispatched a click (regardless of outcome). Use for diagnostics. For attribution, use 'clicked' which indicates the click caused the solve.

click_count.description: Number of times the widget was clicked

click_x.description: Actual click X coordinate (after mouse approach)

presence_duration_ms.description: Human presence simulation duration in ms

presence_phases.description: Number of presence phases (>1 if retried)

approach_phases.description: Number of approach phases (0 = auto-solved before approach)

iframe_states.description: Turnstile iframe state sequence: verifying, success, fail, etc.

widget_find_debug.description: JSON debug info from click target search (iframes, ts_els, forms, shadow_hosts)

widget_error_type.description: Last error type: confirmed_error, error_text, iframe_error, expired
